about_us.title: About Us
about_us.description_one:
At Adz10X, we are redefining how residential societies and brands connect through hyperlocal advertising.

We enable brands to reach high-intent urban consumers where they live and engage daily—through a powerful mix of digital and on-ground touchpoints, including lift panels, main gate branding, kiosks, WhatsApp groups and society events.
about_us.description_two:
At the same time, we empower gated communities to monetize their visibility by connecting them with relevant brands through non-intrusive, high-value advertising opportunities.

Our platform brings together targeting, execution, and performance tracking—allowing brands to run scalable campaigns while creating a new, sustainable income stream for residential societies.

offering_content.description: Drive hyperlocal sales by targeting residents in gated residential societies with location-specific offers and high-conversion campaigns.

faqData.title: What is ADZ10X and how does it work?
faqData.content: ADZ10X enables societies to earn by allowing brands to advertise across WhatsApp, lift branding, notice boards, and kiosk campaigns.

faqData.title: How do societies earn from ADZ10X?
faqData.content: Societies earn by enabling brand campaigns across multiple assets—more activations mean higher earnings.

faqData.title: Is this service free for societies?
faqData.content: Yes, it’s completely free—societies earn while we manage everything.

faqData.title: Can societies control what ads are shown?
faqData.content: Yes, all campaigns go live only after society admin approval.

faqData.title: What kind of brands advertise on ADZ10X?
faqData.content: Only verified brands across sectors like real estate, healthcare, FMCG, education, and more.

faqData.title: How quickly can a campaign go live?
faqData.content: Campaigns can go live within 24–72 hours after approvals.

faqData.title: What is the payout process?
faqData.content: Earnings are directly transferred to society accounts with no deductions or minimum limits.

faqData.title: Can societies choose which assets to activate?
faqData.content: Yes, societies can select preferred media assets and approve every campaign.

faqData.title: Can brands target specific societies or locations?
faqData.content: Yes, brands can target specific cities, localities, society types, and media assets.

faqData.title: What support is available for onboarding or issues?
faqData.content: Dedicated support and relationship managers assist throughout onboarding and campaign execution.
